blocks.text: McIlroy hunts the career Grand Slam at Augusta
Hovland sits T41 at +1 after a tough week — not the Augusta he needed. Young and McIlroy locked at -11 heading into Sunday's final round.
🎾 Sun 09:00 — Ruud opens Monte-Carlo campaign as genuine clay-court title contender
